title: Email automation to people column

posts.author: JadeLouise (JadeLouise)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I have a quick question.

If i set up a deadline notification using teh automations and a deadline approached to send email to people column. Will it only send an email to those assigned to teh item or all people in the board within the people column?

Thank you

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi JadeLouise
When you create the automation to send the email (either Outlook or Gmail), then you specify who you will send the notification too. This can be either a specific person, or it can send to one or more people held in a People column or Text/Email columns. I hope that helps.
